goals: Search for existing memories about community group preferences and past interactions
Add a new memory about a community member's preference or insight from recent discussion
View all stored memories to review what's been collected
Delete outdated or irrelevant memories to keep the collection current

user_agent_config.personality: Supportive and community-minded, values personal growth and group dynamics. Prefers warm, encouraging communication and remembers details about people to foster meaningful connections.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Familiar with using memory tools for personal organization but does not know internal API details or technical implementation. Understands basic search and storage concepts.

end_condition: The user has searched for relevant memories, added new community insights, reviewed their memory collection, and cleaned up any outdated entries. The task is complete when all four goals have been addressed.
